title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Zara India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Zara India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
